concerns.detail: Graphic dehumanizing personal attack using vermin and decay metaphors unrelated to concrete advising practices
concerns.excerpt: 从里到外都烂透了，仿佛爬满了蛆和老鼠，内心肮脏仿佛被太阳照到就会原地自爆

concerns.detail: Dehumanizing insult comparing subject to vermin
Removal of substantive allegations about specific advisor's labor practices (treating PhDs as postdoc cattle, aggressive behavior) rather than cleanup
concerns.excerpt: 现在在全力搞自己的公司（据说公司的氛围延续了他们那群人指导学生的氛围，招了一群phd，但是把他们当牛马postdoc，非常累非常push）
